justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified both time preferences (9 AM and 13:00) and checked for availability for both on the specified date.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively communicated the availability of the 9 AM slot and the unavailability of the 13:00 slot, then offered the available option for booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed both time preferences in a single turn and presented the available option without unnecessary back-and-forth.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent clearly stating availability and offering a viable option, leading to a quick resolution.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent gracefully handled the partial unavailability by clearly stating what was available and offering it as an alternative, maintaining full context.
